text: Leon and Debra Black visited Epstein's Wyoming ranch for lunch, then flew together to Los Angeles on their plane.
Epstein and associates traveled to Omaha for the Berkshire Hathaway annual shareholders' meeting.
Epstein scheduled a full day at Harvard University — "a full day of smarts" — departing at 7am, returning at midnight.
DOJ records: 33 electronic devices seized from Epstein NYC residence on July 11, 2019, 5 days after his arrest.
FBI records: Ghislaine Maxwell arrested at Bradford, NH property on morning of July 2, 2020.
